description_long: This is a maroon-colored tube of shaving cream labeled 'Natura Essencial Supreme'. The tube is made of a flexible plastic material and features a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The front displays the brand and product name in white text, along with a small logo and product volume (75g). The back side contains detailed usage instructions and additional product information in white text. The tube tapers towards the top, ending in a small, flat cap that is likely screw-on. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible patterns except for the brand logo and text.
description: A maroon, smooth plastic tube of 'Natura Essencial Supreme' shaving cream with white text and a screw-on cap. The design is minimalist, featuring only branding and product information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Natura Essencial Supreme' branding, logo, and product volume in white text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the tube's tapered, conical shape and the narrow profile of the cap.
description_view_2: Back view displaying detailed product instructions and information in white text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the tube's conical profile with minimal visible text.
